name: delon-util
description: @delon/util skill - Utility functions library for array, string, date, number manipulation. For ng-events construction site progress tracking system.
capabilities: Deep copy and merge arrays and objects
Calculate date ranges and relative time
Check empty values and deep equality
author: 7Spade
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation with TypeScript code examples for the @delon/util Angular library. All 65 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misidentifying documentation text and code examples as security issues. No executable code, network calls, or credential access exists in this skill.
valueStatement: Complex data manipulation tasks require multiple helper functions. This skill provides ready-to-use utilities for array operations, string formatting, date calculations, and number formatting in Angular projects.
userTitle: Use utility functions for data manipulation
limitations: Browser utilities only work in browser environment

useCases.title: Data transformation in components
useCases.description: Transform and format data for display in Angular templates using utility functions

useCases.title: Form data handling
useCases.description: Clone and merge form data with default values safely without mutating originals

useCases.title: API response processing
useCases.description: Process and normalize API responses using deep copy and grouping utilities

promptTemplates.title: Deep copy objects
promptTemplates.prompt: Use deepCopy to create an independent copy of this object. Show how changes to the copy do not affect the original.

promptTemplates.title: Format strings
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the format function to create a message with template variables. Demonstrate both indexed and named parameters.

promptTemplates.title: Calculate date ranges
promptTemplates.prompt: Use getTimeDistance to get the start and end dates for this week. Show how to calculate relative dates with offset.

promptTemplates.title: Group and sort data
promptTemplates.prompt: Use groupBy and orderBy to organize this list of items. Group by status field and sort by priority.

bestPractices: Use deepCopy for immutability when modifying state objects
Wrap grouping and sorting in computed signals for reactivity
Import specific utilities to enable tree-shaking
antiPatterns: Mutating original objects instead of using deepCopy
Calling deepCopy on very large objects frequently
Using browser utilities in server-side rendering context

faq.question: What Angular versions are supported?
faq.answer: Works with Angular 16+ including standalone components and signals support.

faq.question: What is the package size impact?
faq.answer: Individual imports enable tree-shaking. Most utilities are under 1KB gzipped.

faq.question: How do I install the package?
faq.answer: Run npm install @delon/util@20.1.0 and import utilities from @delon/util/[category].

faq.question: Is my data safe with deepCopy?
faq.answer: Yes. deepCopy creates complete independent clones. Original objects remain unmodified.

faq.question: Why is copyToClipboard async?
faq.answer: Clipboard API requires user permission. The async function handles permission requests properly.

faq.question: How does this compare to lodash?
faq.answer: Smaller bundle size and Angular-specific optimizations. Compatible API for common use cases.
